body:
## Rationale
#1411 (approved) adds SSR meta to ~15 `/drummer/<slug>/endorsements` pages. FAQPage JSON-LD is the natural next layer — same pattern applied to:
- Band pages: SSR meta #1172 → FAQPage #1307 ✅
- Technique pages: SSR meta #1202 → FAQPage #1310 ✅

Endorsement pages already have the natural FAQ questions: 'What brands does X endorse?', 'What equipment is X endorsed by?', 'Does X endorse Zildjian?'. FAQPage schema → AI Overview eligibility for celebrity endorsement queries.

## Files to touch
- `api/meta/[...path].js` — find the endorsements path matcher added by #1411 and add a `faqSchema` property

## FAQPage schema shape (per drummer)
```javascript
faqSchema: [
  {
    question: `What brands does ${drummer.name} endorse?`,
    answer: `${drummer.name} endorses ${endorsements.map(e => e.brand).join(', ')}...`
  },
  {
    question: `What drum kit does ${drummer.name} endorse?`,
    answer: `${drummer.name}'s main drum endorsement is ${primaryKit}...`
  },
  {
    question: `Does ${drummer.name} endorse cymbals?`,
    answer: `${drummer.name} endorses ${cymbalBrand} cymbals...`
  }
]
```

Data source: drummer's endorsement data already available in the endorsements handler (same data used to generate the page content).

## Page count
~15 pages (all drummers with endorsement sub-pages)

## Estimated organic uplift
'What brands does [drummer] endorse?' is a direct AI search query — AI Overview eligibility via FAQPage schema. Same uplift pattern demonstrated on band pages (#1307) and technique pages (#1310).

## Sequencing
Implement AFTER #1411 ships (SSR meta must exist before adding FAQPage to same handler block).

## Verify
1. `curl /api/meta?path=/drummer/joey-jordison/endorsements` returns non-null `faqSchema`
2. JSON-LD `@type` is 'FAQPage' with ≥3 Q&As
3. Questions are endorsement-specific (not generic drummer questions)
4. No regression on drummer profile or other /drummer/<slug>/* handlers
5. Google Rich Results Test validates FAQPage

## Done
PR merged adding faqSchema to endorsements handler in api/meta/[...path].js.
title: SEO batch: /drummer/<slug>/endorsements pages — add FAQPage JSON-LD for AI Overview eligibility (~15 pages)
